cli_serve_description: 启动 AIO Proxy 服务器。
cli_serve_option_open_description: TODO(i18n): Open the dashboard in the default browser after startup.
cli_dashboard_description: 打开 AIO Proxy 控制台。
cli_provider_install_description: TODO(i18n): Install a runtime provider package.
cli_provider_install_option_registry_des: TODO(i18n): Override the npm registry URL.
cli_provider_login_description: TODO(i18n): Interactive OAuth login for a provider vendor.
cli_provider_list_description: TODO(i18n): List providers reported by the running server.
cli_provider_list_option_filter_descript: TODO(i18n): Show only one provider by id.
cli_provider_list_option_probe_descripti: TODO(i18n): Probe each provider before printing.
cli_provider_list_option_installed_descr: TODO(i18n): List runtime provider packages installed on disk.
cli_provider_test_description: TODO(i18n): Probe a single provider by id.
cli_dashboard_not_yet_implemented: TODO(i18n): The dashboard command is not yet implemented; run `aio-proxy serve --open` to open the dashboard.
cli_trace_prune_description: 清理已存储的追踪事件。
cli_bootstrap_empty_config: 配置已初始化到 {path}。请编辑它，或打开控制台 {dashboardUrl}。
cli_serve_started: AIO Proxy 正在监听 {apiUrl}。控制台：{dashboardUrl}
error_provider_not_installed: 提供商包尚未安装：{pkg}。请先运行 `aio-proxy provider install {pkg}`。
error_alias_collision: 别名冲突：{alias} 同时由 {providerA} 和 {providerB} 提供。请重命名其中一个，或使用 provider/alias 语法。
error_stale_provider_generation: {provider} 的提供商生成结果已过期。请重新生成提供商。
error_internal_unexpected: 发生未预期的内部错误。
